zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenlyn Mechyll於大約1227年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特時，她的父親Rhys Mechyll32歲，母親Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer28歲。她於1249年與Gilbert Talbot在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1268年在英國史洛普爾享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenlyn Mechyll于大约1227年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾利安迪費桑特时，她的父亲Rhys Mechyll32岁，母亲Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer28岁。她于1249年与Gilbert Talbot在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾丁萊 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1268年在英国史洛普爾享年43岁。

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenlyn Mechyll was born about 1227, in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales, her father, Rhys Mechyll, was 32 and her mother, Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer, was 28. She married Gilbert Talbot in 1249, in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1268, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenlyn Mechyll est née environ 1227, à Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Rhys Mechyll, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Talbot en 1249, à Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1268, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.Dynevor Castle, Llandilo, Carmarthenshir: Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenlyn Mechyll um 1227 in Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rhys Mechyll 32 und ihre Mutter Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer 28. Sie hat 1249 in Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom Gilbert Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1268 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenlyn Mechyll è nata il circa 1227 nel Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Galles, sua padre, Rhys Mechyll, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert Talbot nel 1249, nel Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1268, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenlyn Mechyllが約1227年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアランディフエイサントで生まれた時，父Rhys Mechyllは32歳，母Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimerは28歳であった。1249年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアディンエフウル カストルでGilbert Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1268年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenlyn Mechyll(이)가 대략 1227년 웨일스 카마테실르 랜디프이산트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rhys Mechyll(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1249년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 딘프르 카스틀에서 Gilbert Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1268년 영국 슈럽실르에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenlyn Mechyll nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Llandyfeisant, Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Rhys Mechyll, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Talbot em 1249, em Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1268, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenlyn Mechyll родилась около 1227 г. в местности лландифисант, кармартеншир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Rhys Mechyll было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maude de Braose - Heiress of Tavistock Baroness Mortimer, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Talbot в 1249 г. в местности даинофр кастл, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1268 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 43 лет.

Se casó con Gilbert Talbot en 1249, en Dinefwr Castle, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1268, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 43 años.
